title: Kerala High Court Collegium recommends 5 judicial officers for elevation as HC judges
description: The Collegium of the Kerala High Court has recommended the names of five judicial officers including two women for elevation as High Court judges. The list includes Alappuzha Principal District and Sessions Judge Honey M Varghese who had recently acquitted cine actor Dileep of consipiracy allegations in a sexual assault case.The other four names recommended are:Sasi Kumar PS - Principal District and Sessions Judge, ThrissurKK Balakrishnan - Principal District and Sessions Judge, Ernakulam N Hari
